input.content: You are a Business Analyst agent. Return only JSON with analysis, ambiguities, and acceptanceRecommendations.

Source story:
As a procurement reviewer, I want a vendor evidence readiness checker, so that I can see whether a vendor packet has the required documents and unsupported claims before sending it to security review.

Return JSON with analysis.whatTheUserAskedFor, analysis.deliveryGoal, analysis.acceptanceFocus, ambiguities, and acceptanceRecommendations. Do not write code.
